title: Monday Map Widget - Color Legend

posts.author: Zachsales (Zach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we get a color legend added to the Monday Map Widget please!!!

Right now, the only way to know which board/group it comes from is by clicking on each individual pin.

And we can color the map by certain columns? I.e. Show location pin on map by location column, but color by a selected column applicable to the board columns (not just groups). So we don’t have to segregate data into special groups to get different colors?

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Zach:

And we can color the map by certain columns? I.e. Show location pin on map by location column, but color by a selected column applicable to the board columns (not just groups). So we don’t have to segregate data into special groups to get different colors?

Hi Zach,

We totally understand your question. That’s why we’ve build an app for monday.com Map View Pro.

While there’s no legend yet, we do support using data from several column types as a source for the pin color. Have a look and use our free 14 day trial to see if our app helps!

Don’t hesitate to reach out with any feedback or feature request.

Best,

Maarten
